sql.isNotEqual: DF.FILE_NAME1 LIKE CONCAT ('%', #searchFileName#, '%') OR DF.FILE_NAME2 LIKE CONCAT ('%', #searchFileName#, '%')
DF.CREATE_NAME1 LIKE CONCAT ('%', #searchCreatorName#, '%') OR DF.CREATE_NAME2 LIKE CONCAT ('%', #searchCreatorName#, '%')
RESULT.TARGET_NAME1 LIKE CONCAT ('%', #searchFileName#, '%') OR RESULT.TARGET_NAME2 LIKE CONCAT ('%', #searchFileName#, '%')
RESULT.CREATE_NAME1 LIKE CONCAT ('%', #searchCreatorName#, '%') OR RESULT.CREATE_NAME2 LIKE CONCAT ('%', #searchCreatorName#, '%')

sqlMap.select:
SELECT DF.FILE_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN DF.FILE_NAME1 ELSE DF.FILE_NAME2 END FILE_NAME, DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE, DF.FOLDER_TYPE, DF.FILE_PATH, DF.FILE_SIZE, DF.FILE_EXT, DF.FOLDER_PATH, DF.OWNER_ID, DF.USE_STATUS, DF.CREATE_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN DF.CREATE_NAME1 ELSE DF.CREATE_NAME2 END CREATE_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DF.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS CREATE_DATE, DF.UPDATE_ID, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DF.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UPDATE_DATE, DF.TYPE_ID, FT2.TYPE_NAME, FT2.TYPE_ICON, CASE WHEN FV.USER_ID IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END FAVORITE_STATUS, S.SHARE_ID, S.SHARER_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN S.SHARER_NAME1 ELSE S.SHARER_NAME2 END SHARER_NAME, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN SUBSTRING(S.USER_NAME_LIST, 1, INSTR(S.USER_NAME_LIST, '|') - 1) ELSE SUBSTRING(S.USER_NAME_LIST, INSTR(S.USER_NAME_LIST, '|') + 1) END USER_LIST, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(S.SHARE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS SHARE_DATE, '' AS SUB_STATUS, S.TENANT_ID FROM ( SELECT D.FOLDER_ID AS FILE_ID, D.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FILE_NAME1, D.FOLDER_NAME2 AS FILE_NAME2, 'D' AS FOLDERFILE_TYPE, D.FOLDER_TYPE, '' AS FILE_PATH, '' AS FILE_SIZE, FT.FILE_EXT, D.FOLDER_PATH, D.OWNER_ID, D.USE_STATUS, D.CREATE_ID, D.CREATE_NAME1, D.CREATE_NAME2, D.CREATE_DATE, D.UPDATE_ID, D.UPDATE_DATE, FT.TYPE_ID, D.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER AS D JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE AS FT ON FT.FILE_EXT = 'folder' AND D.TENANT_ID = FT.TENANT_ID UNION SELECT F.FILE_ID AS FILE_ID, F.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME1, F.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME2, 'F' AS FOLDERFILE_TYPE, D2.FOLDER_TYPE, F.FILE_PATH, F.FILE_SIZE, F.FILE_EXT, D2.FOLDER_PATH, D2.OWNER_ID, F.USE_STATUS, F.CREATE_ID, F.CREATE_NAME1, F.CREATE_NAME2, F.CREATE_DATE, F.UPDATE_ID, F.UPDATE_DATE, F.TYPE_ID, F.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE AS F JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER AS D2 ON F.FOLDER_ID = D2.FOLDER_ID AND F.TENANT_ID = D2.TENANT_ID ) AS DF JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE FT2 ON DF.TYPE_ID = FT2.TYPE_ID AND DF.TENANT_ID = FT2.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FAVOR AS FV ON DF.FILE_ID = FV.TARGET_ID AND DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = FV.TARGET_TYPE AND DF.TENANT_ID = FV.TENANT_ID AND FV.USER_ID = #userId# JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE AS S ON S.FOLDERFILE_ID = DF.FILE_ID AND S.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE AND SHARER_ID = #userId# AND S.TENANT_ID = DF.TENANT_ID WHERE DF.USE_STATUS = 'Y'
AND DF.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY FOLDERFILE_TYPE, FILE_NAME LIMIT #startPoint#, #pageSize#

SELECT DF.FILE_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN DF.FILE_NAME1 ELSE DF.FILE_NAME2 END FILE_NAME, DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE, DF.FOLDER_TYPE, DF.FILE_PATH, DF.FILE_SIZE, DF.FILE_EXT, DF.FOLDER_PATH, DF.OWNER_ID, DF.USE_STATUS, DF.CREATE_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN DF.CREATE_NAME1 ELSE DF.CREATE_NAME2 END CREATE_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DF.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS CREATE_DATE, DF.UPDATE_ID, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DF.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UPDATE_DATE, DF.TYPE_ID, FT2.TYPE_NAME, FT2.TYPE_ICON, CASE WHEN FV.USER_ID IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END FAVORITE_STATUS, S.SHARE_ID, S.SHARER_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN S.SHARER_NAME1 ELSE S.SHARER_NAME2 END SHARER_NAME, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN SUBSTRING(S.USER_NAME_LIST, 1, INSTR(S.USER_NAME_LIST, '|') - 1) ELSE SUBSTRING(S.USER_NAME_LIST, INSTR(S.USER_NAME_LIST, '|') + 1) END USER_LIST, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(S.SHARE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS SHARE_DATE, SS.SUB_STATUS, S.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE AS S JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE_SUB AS SS ON S.SHARE_ID = SS.SHARE_ID AND SS.USER_ID IN
#idList[].id#
AND S.TENANT_ID = SS.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE_HIDE AS SH ON S.SHARE_ID = SH.SHARE_ID AND S.TENANT_ID = SH.TENANT_ID AND SH.USER_ID = #userId# JOIN ( SELECT D.FOLDER_ID AS FILE_ID, D.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FILE_NAME1, D.FOLDER_NAME2 AS FILE_NAME2, 'D' AS FOLDERFILE_TYPE, D.FOLDER_TYPE, '' AS FILE_PATH, '' AS FILE_SIZE, FT.FILE_EXT, D.FOLDER_PATH, D.OWNER_ID, D.USE_STATUS, D.CREATE_ID, D.CREATE_NAME1, D.CREATE_NAME2, D.CREATE_DATE, D.UPDATE_ID, D.UPDATE_DATE, FT.TYPE_ID, D.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER AS D JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE AS FT ON FT.FILE_EXT = 'folder' AND D.TENANT_ID = FT.TENANT_ID UNION SELECT F.FILE_ID AS FILE_ID, F.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME1, F.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME2, 'F' AS FOLDERFILE_TYPE, D2.FOLDER_TYPE, F.FILE_PATH, F.FILE_SIZE, F.FILE_EXT, D2.FOLDER_PATH, D2.OWNER_ID, F.USE_STATUS, F.CREATE_ID, F.CREATE_NAME1, F.CREATE_NAME2, F.CREATE_DATE, F.UPDATE_ID, F.UPDATE_DATE, F.TYPE_ID, F.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE AS F JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER AS D2 ON F.FOLDER_ID = D2.FOLDER_ID AND F.TENANT_ID = D2.TENANT_ID ) AS DF ON S.FOLDERFILE_ID = DF.FILE_ID AND S.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE AND S.TENANT_ID = DF.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE FT2 ON DF.TYPE_ID = FT2.TYPE_ID AND DF.TENANT_ID = FT2.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FAVOR AS FV ON DF.FILE_ID = FV.TARGET_ID AND DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = FV.TARGET_TYPE AND DF.TENANT_ID = FV.TENANT_ID AND FV.USER_ID = #userId# WHERE DF.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND SH.USER_ID IS NULL
AND S.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY SHARE_DATE DESC LIMIT #startPoint#, #pageSize#

SELECT UU.FOLDERFILE_TYPE, COUNT(UU.FOLDERFILE_TYPE) AS COUNT FROM ( SELECT DF.FILE_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN DF.FILE_NAME1 ELSE DF.FILE_NAME2 END FILE_NAME, DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE, DF.FOLDER_TYPE, DF.FILE_PATH, DF.FILE_SIZE, DF.FILE_EXT, DF.FOLDER_PATH, DF.OWNER_ID, DF.USE_STATUS, DF.CREATE_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN DF.CREATE_NAME1 ELSE DF.CREATE_NAME2 END CREATE_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DF.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS CREATE_DATE, DF.UPDATE_ID, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DF.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UPDATE_DATE, DF.TYPE_ID, FT2.TYPE_NAME, FT2.TYPE_ICON, CASE WHEN FV.USER_ID IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END FAVORITE_STATUS, S.SHARE_ID, S.SHARER_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN S.SHARER_NAME1 ELSE S.SHARER_NAME2 END SHARER_NAME, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN SUBSTRING(S.USER_NAME_LIST, 1, INSTR(S.USER_NAME_LIST, '|') - 1) ELSE SUBSTRING(S.USER_NAME_LIST, INSTR(S.USER_NAME_LIST, '|') + 1) END USER_LIST, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(S.SHARE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS SHARE_DATE, '' AS SUB_STATUS, S.TENANT_ID FROM ( SELECT D.FOLDER_ID AS FILE_ID, D.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FILE_NAME1, D.FOLDER_NAME2 AS FILE_NAME2, 'D' AS FOLDERFILE_TYPE, D.FOLDER_TYPE, '' AS FILE_PATH, '' AS FILE_SIZE, FT.FILE_EXT, D.FOLDER_PATH, D.OWNER_ID, D.USE_STATUS, D.CREATE_ID, D.CREATE_NAME1, D.CREATE_NAME2, D.CREATE_DATE, D.UPDATE_ID, D.UPDATE_DATE, FT.TYPE_ID, D.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER AS D JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE AS FT ON FT.FILE_EXT = 'folder' AND D.TENANT_ID = FT.TENANT_ID UNION SELECT F.FILE_ID AS FILE_ID, F.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME1, F.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME2, 'F' AS FOLDERFILE_TYPE, D2.FOLDER_TYPE, F.FILE_PATH, F.FILE_SIZE, F.FILE_EXT, D2.FOLDER_PATH, D2.OWNER_ID, F.USE_STATUS, F.CREATE_ID, F.CREATE_NAME1, F.CREATE_NAME2, F.CREATE_DATE, F.UPDATE_ID, F.UPDATE_DATE, F.TYPE_ID, F.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE AS F JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER AS D2 ON F.FOLDER_ID = D2.FOLDER_ID AND F.TENANT_ID = D2.TENANT_ID ) AS DF JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE FT2 ON DF.TYPE_ID = FT2.TYPE_ID AND DF.TENANT_ID = FT2.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FAVOR AS FV ON DF.FILE_ID = FV.TARGET_ID AND DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = FV.TARGET_TYPE AND DF.TENANT_ID = FV.TENANT_ID AND FV.USER_ID = #userId# JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE AS S ON S.FOLDERFILE_ID = DF.FILE_ID AND S.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE AND SHARER_ID = #userId# AND S.TENANT_ID = DF.TENANT_ID WHERE DF.USE_STATUS = 'Y'
AND DF.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) AS UU GROUP BY UU.FOLDERFILE_TYPE

SELECT UU.FOLDERFILE_TYPE, COUNT(UU.FOLDERFILE_TYPE) AS COUNT FROM ( SELECT DF.FILE_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN DF.FILE_NAME1 ELSE DF.FILE_NAME2 END FILE_NAME, DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE, DF.FOLDER_TYPE, DF.FILE_PATH, DF.FILE_SIZE, DF.FILE_EXT, DF.FOLDER_PATH, DF.OWNER_ID, DF.USE_STATUS, DF.CREATE_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN DF.CREATE_NAME1 ELSE DF.CREATE_NAME2 END CREATE_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DF.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS CREATE_DATE, DF.UPDATE_ID, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DF.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UPDATE_DATE, DF.TYPE_ID, FT2.TYPE_NAME, FT2.TYPE_ICON, CASE WHEN FV.USER_ID IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END FAVORITE_STATUS, S.SHARE_ID, S.SHARER_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN S.SHARER_NAME1 ELSE S.SHARER_NAME2 END SHARER_NAME, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN SUBSTRING(S.USER_NAME_LIST, 1, INSTR(S.USER_NAME_LIST, '|') - 1) ELSE SUBSTRING(S.USER_NAME_LIST, INSTR(S.USER_NAME_LIST, '|') + 1) END USER_LIST, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(S.SHARE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS SHARE_DATE, SS.SUB_STATUS, S.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE AS S JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE_SUB AS SS ON S.SHARE_ID = SS.SHARE_ID AND SS.USER_ID IN
#idList[].id#
AND S.TENANT_ID = SS.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE_HIDE AS SH ON S.SHARE_ID = SH.SHARE_ID AND S.TENANT_ID = SH.TENANT_ID AND SH.USER_ID = #userId# JOIN ( SELECT D.FOLDER_ID AS FILE_ID, D.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FILE_NAME1, D.FOLDER_NAME2 AS FILE_NAME2, 'D' AS FOLDERFILE_TYPE, D.FOLDER_TYPE, '' AS FILE_PATH, '' AS FILE_SIZE, FT.FILE_EXT, D.FOLDER_PATH, D.OWNER_ID, D.USE_STATUS, D.CREATE_ID, D.CREATE_NAME1, D.CREATE_NAME2, D.CREATE_DATE, D.UPDATE_ID, D.UPDATE_DATE, FT.TYPE_ID, D.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER AS D JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE AS FT ON FT.FILE_EXT = 'folder' AND D.TENANT_ID = FT.TENANT_ID UNION SELECT F.FILE_ID AS FILE_ID, F.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME1, F.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME2, 'F' AS FOLDERFILE_TYPE, D2.FOLDER_TYPE, F.FILE_PATH, F.FILE_SIZE, F.FILE_EXT, D2.FOLDER_PATH, D2.OWNER_ID, F.USE_STATUS, F.CREATE_ID, F.CREATE_NAME1, F.CREATE_NAME2, F.CREATE_DATE, F.UPDATE_ID, F.UPDATE_DATE, F.TYPE_ID, F.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE AS F JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER AS D2 ON F.FOLDER_ID = D2.FOLDER_ID AND F.TENANT_ID = D2.TENANT_ID ) AS DF ON S.FOLDERFILE_ID = DF.FILE_ID AND S.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE AND S.TENANT_ID = DF.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE FT2 ON DF.TYPE_ID = FT2.TYPE_ID AND DF.TENANT_ID = FT2.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FAVOR AS FV ON DF.FILE_ID = FV.TARGET_ID AND DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = FV.TARGET_TYPE AND DF.TENANT_ID = FV.TENANT_ID AND FV.USER_ID = #userId# WHERE DF.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND SH.USER_ID IS NULL
AND S.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) AS UU GROUP BY UU.FOLDERFILE_TYPE

SELECT CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DISPLAYNAME FROM ( SELECT CN, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER UNION SELECT CN, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER ) AS A WHERE CN IN
#idList[]#
AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY DISPLAYNAME

SELECT F.OWNER_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER FU JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER F ON FU.FOLDER_ID = F.FOLDER_ID AND FU.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID WHERE FU.USER_ID = #userId# AND USER_TYPE = 'chief' AND FU.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert:
SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(SHARE_ID) IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE MAX(SHARE_ID) + 1 END AS ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
INSERT INTO TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE ( SHARE_ID, SHARER_ID, SHARER_NAME1, SHARER_NAME2, FOLDERFILE_ID, FOLDERFILE_TYPE, USER_NAME_LIST, SHARE_DATE, TENANT_ID ) SELECT #id#, #sharerId#, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, #folderFileId#, #folderFileType#, #userNameList#, #shareDate#, #tenantId# FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #sharerId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

INSERT INTO TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE_SUB ( SHARE_ID, USER_ID, USER_NAME1, USER_NAME2, USER_TYPE, SUB_STATUS, TENANT_ID ) SELECT #shareId#, #userId#, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, #userType#, #subStatus#, #tenantId#
FROM TBL_USERMASTER
FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER
WHERE CN = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT SHARE_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE WHERE SHARER_ID = #sharerId# AND FOLDERFILE_ID = #folderFileId# AND FOLDERFILE_TYPE = #folderFileType# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE_SUB WHERE SHARE_ID = #shareId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE SET USER_NAME_LIST = ( SELECT CONCAT(group_concat(DISPLAYNAME), '|', group_concat(DISPLAYNAME2)) FROM ( SELECT DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN IN
#idList[].id#
AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# UNION SELECT DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN IN
#idList[].id#
AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) AS UD ), SHARE_DATE = #shareDate# WHERE SHARE_ID = #shareId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE WHERE SHARE_ID = #shareId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT DF.FILE_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN DF.FILE_NAME1 ELSE DF.FILE_NAME2 END FILE_NAME, DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE, DF.FOLDER_TYPE, DF.FILE_PATH, DF.FILE_SIZE, DF.FILE_EXT, DF.FOLDER_PATH, DF.OWNER_ID, DF.USE_STATUS, DF.CREATE_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN DF.CREATE_NAME1 ELSE DF.CREATE_NAME2 END CREATE_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DF.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS CREATE_DATE, DF.UPDATE_ID, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DF.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UPDATE_DATE, DF.TYPE_ID, FT2.TYPE_NAME, FT2.TYPE_ICON, CASE WHEN FV.USER_ID IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END FAVORITE_STATUS, S.SHARE_ID, S.SHARER_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN S.SHARER_NAME1 ELSE S.SHARER_NAME2 END SHARER_NAME, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN SUBSTRING(S.USER_NAME_LIST, 1, INSTR(S.USER_NAME_LIST, '|') - 1) ELSE SUBSTRING(S.USER_NAME_LIST, INSTR(S.USER_NAME_LIST, '|') + 1) END USER_LIST, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(S.SHARE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS SHARE_DATE, SS.SUB_STATUS, S.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE AS S JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE_SUB AS SS ON S.SHARE_ID = SS.SHARE_ID AND SS.USER_ID IN
#idList[].id#
AND S.TENANT_ID = SS.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE_HIDE AS SH ON S.SHARE_ID = SH.SHARE_ID AND S.TENANT_ID = SH.TENANT_ID AND SH.USER_ID = #userId# JOIN ( SELECT D.FOLDER_ID AS FILE_ID, D.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FILE_NAME1, D.FOLDER_NAME2 AS FILE_NAME2, 'D' AS FOLDERFILE_TYPE, D.FOLDER_TYPE, '' AS FILE_PATH, '' AS FILE_SIZE, FT.FILE_EXT, D.FOLDER_PATH, D.OWNER_ID, D.USE_STATUS, D.CREATE_ID, D.CREATE_NAME1, D.CREATE_NAME2, D.CREATE_DATE, D.UPDATE_ID, D.UPDATE_DATE, FT.TYPE_ID, D.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER AS D JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE AS FT ON FT.FILE_EXT = 'folder' AND D.TENANT_ID = FT.TENANT_ID UNION SELECT F.FILE_ID AS FILE_ID, F.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME1, F.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME2, 'F' AS FOLDERFILE_TYPE, D2.FOLDER_TYPE, F.FILE_PATH, F.FILE_SIZE, F.FILE_EXT, D2.FOLDER_PATH, D2.OWNER_ID, F.USE_STATUS, F.CREATE_ID, F.CREATE_NAME1, F.CREATE_NAME2, F.CREATE_DATE, F.UPDATE_ID, F.UPDATE_DATE, F.TYPE_ID, F.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE AS F JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER AS D2 ON F.FOLDER_ID = D2.FOLDER_ID AND F.TENANT_ID = D2.TENANT_ID ) AS DF ON S.FOLDERFILE_ID = DF.FILE_ID AND S.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE AND S.TENANT_ID = DF.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE FT2 ON DF.TYPE_ID = FT2.TYPE_ID AND DF.TENANT_ID = FT2.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FAVOR AS FV ON DF.FILE_ID = FV.TARGET_ID AND DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = FV.TARGET_TYPE AND DF.TENANT_ID = FV.TENANT_ID AND FV.USER_ID = #userId# WHERE DF.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND S.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY SHARE_DATE DESC LIMIT #startPoint#, #pageSize#

SELECT UU.FOLDERFILE_TYPE, COUNT(UU.FOLDERFILE_TYPE) AS COUNT FROM ( SELECT DF.FILE_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN DF.FILE_NAME1 ELSE DF.FILE_NAME2 END FILE_NAME, DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE, DF.FOLDER_TYPE, DF.FILE_PATH, DF.FILE_SIZE, DF.FILE_EXT, DF.FOLDER_PATH, DF.OWNER_ID, DF.USE_STATUS, DF.CREATE_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN DF.CREATE_NAME1 ELSE DF.CREATE_NAME2 END CREATE_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DF.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS CREATE_DATE, DF.UPDATE_ID, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DF.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UPDATE_DATE, DF.TYPE_ID, FT2.TYPE_NAME, FT2.TYPE_ICON, CASE WHEN FV.USER_ID IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END FAVORITE_STATUS, S.SHARE_ID, S.SHARER_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN S.SHARER_NAME1 ELSE S.SHARER_NAME2 END SHARER_NAME, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN SUBSTRING(S.USER_NAME_LIST, 1, INSTR(S.USER_NAME_LIST, '|') - 1) ELSE SUBSTRING(S.USER_NAME_LIST, INSTR(S.USER_NAME_LIST, '|') + 1) END USER_LIST, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(S.SHARE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS SHARE_DATE, SS.SUB_STATUS, S.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE AS S JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE_SUB AS SS ON S.SHARE_ID = SS.SHARE_ID AND SS.USER_ID IN
#idList[].id#
AND S.TENANT_ID = SS.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE_HIDE AS SH ON S.SHARE_ID = SH.SHARE_ID AND S.TENANT_ID = SH.TENANT_ID AND SH.USER_ID = #userId# JOIN ( SELECT D.FOLDER_ID AS FILE_ID, D.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FILE_NAME1, D.FOLDER_NAME2 AS FILE_NAME2, 'D' AS FOLDERFILE_TYPE, D.FOLDER_TYPE, '' AS FILE_PATH, '' AS FILE_SIZE, FT.FILE_EXT, D.FOLDER_PATH, D.OWNER_ID, D.USE_STATUS, D.CREATE_ID, D.CREATE_NAME1, D.CREATE_NAME2, D.CREATE_DATE, D.UPDATE_ID, D.UPDATE_DATE, FT.TYPE_ID, D.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER AS D JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE AS FT ON FT.FILE_EXT = 'folder' AND D.TENANT_ID = FT.TENANT_ID UNION SELECT F.FILE_ID AS FILE_ID, F.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME1, F.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME2, 'F' AS FOLDERFILE_TYPE, D2.FOLDER_TYPE, F.FILE_PATH, F.FILE_SIZE, F.FILE_EXT, D2.FOLDER_PATH, D2.OWNER_ID, F.USE_STATUS, F.CREATE_ID, F.CREATE_NAME1, F.CREATE_NAME2, F.CREATE_DATE, F.UPDATE_ID, F.UPDATE_DATE, F.TYPE_ID, F.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE AS F JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER AS D2 ON F.FOLDER_ID = D2.FOLDER_ID AND F.TENANT_ID = D2.TENANT_ID ) AS DF ON S.FOLDERFILE_ID = DF.FILE_ID AND S.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE AND S.TENANT_ID = DF.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE FT2 ON DF.TYPE_ID = FT2.TYPE_ID AND DF.TENANT_ID = FT2.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FAVOR AS FV ON DF.FILE_ID = FV.TARGET_ID AND DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = FV.TARGET_TYPE AND DF.TENANT_ID = FV.TENANT_ID AND FV.USER_ID = #userId# WHERE DF.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND S.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) AS UU GROUP BY UU.FOLDERFILE_TYPE
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE_HIDE ( SHARE_ID, USER_ID, USER_NAME1, USER_NAME2, HIDE_DATE, TENANT_ID ) SELECT #shareId#, #userId#, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, #hideDate#, #tenantId# FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE_HIDE WHERE SHARE_ID = #shareId# AND USER_ID = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT TU.DEPARTMENT FROM TBL_USERMASTER TU WHERE 1=1 AND TU.CN = #userId# AND TU.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
AND TU.DEPARTMENT NOT IN ($notInDept$)
UNION
SELECT TA.DEPTID FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER TA WHERE 1=1 AND TA.CN = #userId# AND TA.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
AND TA.CN NOT IN ($notInDept$)
SELECT TD.DEPT_CD_PATH FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER TD WHERE TD.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 = #userId# AND TD.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT TD.CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER TD WHERE 1=1 AND TD.DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE CONCAT(#deptCdPath#,'%') AND TD.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
AND TD.CN NOT IN ($notInDept$)

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT distinct FOLDER.FOLDER_id AS TRASHCAN_ID, FOLDER.FOLDER_NAME1 AS TRASHCAN_NAME, FOLDER.FOLDER_PATH AS TRASHCAN_PATH, FILE_TYPE.TYPE_ICON AS TRASHCAN_ICON_URL, 'folder' AS TRASHCAN_EXT, 0 AS TRASHCAN_SIZE, DATE_ADD(FOLDER.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS CREATE_DATE, DATE_ADD(FOLDER.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS UPDATE_DATE, FOLDER.CREATE_NAME1 AS CREATE_NAME1, FOLDER.CREATE_NAME2 AS CREATE_NAME2, '' AS FILE_FOLDER_ID, FOLDER.FOLDER_UPPER as FOLDER_UPPER FROM tbl_webfolder_folder AS FOLDER JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE as FILE_TYPE ON FILE_TYPE.TYPE_NAME = 'folder' WHERE FOLDER.USE_STATUS = 'T' AND FOLDER.DELETER_ID = #userId# AND FOLDER.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UNION
SELECT distinct FILES.FILE_id AS TRASHCAN_ID, FILES.FILE_NAME AS TRASHCAN_NAME, FILES.FILE_PATH AS TRASHCAN_PATH, CASE WHEN FILE_TYPE.TYPE_ICON IS NULL THEN (SELECT TYPE_ICON FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE WHERE FILE_EXT = 'unknown' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) ELSE FILE_TYPE.TYPE_ICON END AS TRASHCAN_ICON_URL, FILES.FILE_EXT AS TRASHCAN_EXT, FILES.FILE_SIZE AS TRASHCAN_SIZE, DATE_ADD(FILES.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS CREATE_DATE, DATE_ADD(FILES.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS UPDATE_DATE, FILES.CREATE_NAME1 AS CREATE_NAME1, FILES.CREATE_NAME1 AS CREATE_NAME2, FILES.FOLDER_ID AS FILE_FOLDER_ID, '' as FOLDER_UPPER FROM tbl_webfolder_file AS FILES LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE as FILE_TYPE ON FILE_TYPE.TYPE_ID = FILES.TYPE_ID WHERE FILES.USE_STATUS = 'T' AND FILES.DELETER_ID = #userId# AND FILES.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
) R GROUP BY R.TRASHCAN_ID ORDER BY R.UPDATE_DATE DESC LIMIT #pStart#, #pEnd#

SELECT distinct FILES.FILE_id AS TRASHCAN_ID, FILES.FILE_NAME AS TRASHCAN_NAME, FILES.FILE_PATH AS TRASHCAN_PATH, FILE_TYPE.TYPE_ICON AS TRASHCAN_ICON_URL, FILES.FILE_EXT AS TRASHCAN_EXT, FILES.FILE_SIZE AS TRASHCAN_SIZE, DATE_ADD(FILES.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS CREATE_DATE, DATE_ADD(FILES.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS UPDATE_DATE, FILES.CREATE_NAME1 AS CREATE_NAME1, FILES.CREATE_NAME1 AS CREATE_NAME2, FILES.FOLDER_ID AS FILE_FOLDER_ID, "" as FOLDER_UPPER FROM tbl_webfolder_file AS FILES INNER JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE as FILE_TYPE ON FILE_TYPE.TYPE_ID = FILES.TYPE_ID WHERE FILES.USE_STATUS = 'T' AND FILES.DELETER_ID = #userId# AND FILES.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND FILES.FOLDER_ID = #folderId#
SELECT FOLDER.FOLDER_PATH FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER AS FOLDER where FOLDER.FOLDER_ID = #folderId# AND FOLDER.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND USE_STATUS = 'T'
DELETE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE FOLDER_PATH LIKE CONCAT(#folderPath#, '%') AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND USE_STATUS = 'T'

DELETE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE f JOIN ( SELECT * FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE FOLDER_PATH LIKE CONCAT(#folderPath#, '%') AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# ) AS d ON f.FOLDER_ID = d.FOLDER_ID AND f.TENANT_ID = d.TENANT_ID WHERE f.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND f.USE_STATUS = 'T'
sqlMap.select: SELECT distinct FOLDER.FOLDER_ID AS TRASHCAN_ID, FOLDER.FOLDER_NAME1 AS TRASHCAN_NAME, FOLDER.FOLDER_PATH AS TRASHCAN_PATH, FILE_TYPE.TYPE_ICON AS TRASHCAN_ICON_URL, 'folder' AS TRASHCAN_EXT, 0 AS TRASHCAN_SIZE, DATE_ADD(FOLDER.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS CREATE_DATE, DATE_ADD(FOLDER.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS UPDATE_DATE, FOLDER.CREATE_NAME1 AS CREATE_NAME1, FOLDER.CREATE_NAME1 AS CREATE_NAME2, "" AS FILE_FOLDER_ID, FOLDER.FOLDER_UPPER as FOLDER_UPPER FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER AS FOLDER LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE AS FILE_TYPE ON FILE_TYPE.TYPE_NAME = 'folder' WHERE FOLDER_PATH LIKE CONCAT(#folderPath#, '%') AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE SET USE_STATUS = 'Y', UPDATE_DATE = #timeUTC# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND FILE_ID = #fileId# AND DELETER_ID = #userId#

UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER SET USE_STATUS = 'Y', UPDATE_DATE = #timeUTC# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND FOLDER_PATH LIKE CONCAT(#folderPath#, '%') AND DELETER_ID = #userId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#

UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE f JOIN ( SELECT * FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE FOLDER_PATH LIKE CONCAT(#folderPath#, '%') AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) AS d ON f.FOLDER_ID = d.FOLDER_ID AND f.TENANT_ID = d.TENANT_ID SET f.USE_STATUS = 'Y', f.DELETER_ID = #userId#, f.UPDATE_DATE = #timeUTC# WHERE f.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND f.USE_STATUS = 'T'
sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT FAVOR.TARGET_ID, FILES.FILE_NAME AS TARGET_NAME, FAVOR.TARGET_TYPE AS TARGET_TYPE, FILE_TYPE.TYPE_ICON AS TARGET_ICON_URL, FILE_TYPE.TYPE_NAME, FOLDER.FOLDER_PATH AS TARGET_PATH, FILES.FILE_EXT AS TARGET_EXT, FILES.FILE_SIZE AS TARGET_SIZE, FILES.CREATE_ID, CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN FILES.CREATE_NAME1 ELSE FILES.CREATE_NAME2 END AS CREATOR_NAME, FILES.CREATE_NAME1, FILES.CREATE_NAME2, DATE_ADD(FILES.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS CREATE_DATE, FAVOR.TENANT_ID, FILES.USE_STATUS FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FAVOR AS FAVOR INNER JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE AS FILES ON FILES.FILE_ID = FAVOR.TARGET_ID AND FILES.TENANT_ID = FAVOR.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER FOLDER ON FOLDER.FOLDER_ID = FILES.FOLDER_ID AND FOLDER.TENANT_ID = FAVOR.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE as FILE_TYPE ON FILE_TYPE.TYPE_ID = FILES.TYPE_ID AND FILE_TYPE.TENANT_ID = FAVOR.TENANT_ID WHERE FAVOR.TARGET_TYPE = 'F' AND FAVOR.USER_ID = #userId# AND FAVOR.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UNION
SELECT FAVOR.TARGET_ID, FOLDER.FOLDER_NAME1 AS TARGET_NAME, CONCAT('D_', FOLDER.FOLDER_TYPE) AS TARGET_TYPE, FILE_TYPE.TYPE_ICON AS TARGET_ICON_URL, FILE_TYPE.TYPE_NAME, FOLDER.FOLDER_PATH AS TARGET_PATH, 'folder' AS TARGET_EXT, 0 AS TARGET_SIZE, FOLDER.CREATE_ID, CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN FOLDER.CREATE_NAME1 ELSE FOLDER.CREATE_NAME2 END AS CREATOR_NAME, FOLDER.CREATE_NAME1, FOLDER.CREATE_NAME2, DATE_ADD(FOLDER.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS CREATE_DATE, FAVOR.TENANT_ID, FOLDER.USE_STATUS FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FAVOR AS FAVOR INNER JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE AS FILE_TYPE ON FILE_TYPE.TYPE_NAME = 'folder' AND FILE_TYPE.TENANT_ID = FAVOR.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER AS FOLDER ON FOLDER.FOLDER_ID = FAVOR.TARGET_ID AND FOLDER.TENANT_ID = FAVOR.TENANT_ID WHERE FAVOR.TARGET_TYPE = 'D' AND FAVOR.USER_ID = #userId# AND FAVOR.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) AS RESULT WHERE RESULT.USE_STATUS = 'Y'
ORDER BY RESULT.TARGET_TYPE ASC, CREATE_DATE DESC LIMIT #startIndex#, #listCount#

SELECT COUNT(RESULT.TARGET_NAME) COUNT FROM ( SELECT FOLDER.FOLDER_NAME1 AS TARGET_NAME, CONCAT('D_', FOLDER.FOLDER_TYPE) AS TARGET_TYPE, 'folder' AS TARGET_EXT, FILE_TYPE.TYPE_NAME, FOLDER.CREATE_NAME1, FOLDER.CREATE_NAME2, DATE_ADD(FOLDER.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS CREATE_DATE, FOLDER.USE_STATUS FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FAVOR AS FAVOR INNER JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE AS FILE_TYPE ON FILE_TYPE.TYPE_NAME = 'folder' AND FILE_TYPE.TENANT_ID = FAVOR.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER AS FOLDER ON FOLDER.FOLDER_ID = FAVOR.TARGET_ID AND FOLDER.TENANT_ID = FAVOR.TENANT_ID WHERE FAVOR.TARGET_TYPE = 'D' AND FAVOR.USER_ID = #userId# AND FAVOR.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) AS RESULT WHERE RESULT.USE_STATUS = 'Y'

SELECT COUNT(RESULT.TARGET_NAME) COUNT FROM ( SELECT FILES.FILE_NAME AS TARGET_NAME, FAVOR.TARGET_TYPE AS TARGET_TYPE, FILES.FILE_EXT AS TARGET_EXT, FILE_TYPE.TYPE_NAME, FILES.CREATE_NAME1, FILES.CREATE_NAME2, DATE_ADD(FILES.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS CREATE_DATE, FILES.USE_STATUS FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FAVOR AS FAVOR INNER JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE AS FILES ON FILES.FILE_ID = FAVOR.TARGET_ID AND FILES.TENANT_ID = FAVOR.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE as FILE_TYPE ON FILE_TYPE.TYPE_ID = FILES.TYPE_ID AND FILE_TYPE.TENANT_ID = FAVOR.TENANT_ID WHERE FAVOR.TARGET_TYPE = 'F' AND FAVOR.USER_ID = #userId# AND FAVOR.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND FILES.USE_STATUS = 'Y' ) AS RESULT WHERE RESULT.USE_STATUS = 'Y'

SELECT COUNT(FAVOR.TARGET_ID) COUNT FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FAVOR AS FAVOR WHERE FAVOR.TARGET_ID = #targetId# AND FAVOR.TARGET_TYPE = #targetType# AND FAVOR.USER_ID = #userId# AND FAVOR.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FAVOR WHERE TARGET_ID = #targetId# AND TARGET_TYPE = #targetType# AND USER_ID = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT count(FILES.FILE_id ) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE AS FILES WHERE FILES.USE_STATUS = 'T' AND FILES.DELETER_ID = #userId# AND FILES.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT count(FOLDER.FOLDER_id) FROM tbl_webfolder_folder AS FOLDER WHERE FOLDER.USE_STATUS = 'T' AND FOLDER.DELETER_ID = #userId# AND FOLDER.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE tbl_webfolder_folder SET FOLDER_TYPE = #folderType#, UPDATE_DATE = #updateTime#, UPDATE_ID = #userId#, OWNER_ID = #ownerId#, FOLDER_PATH = replace(FOLDER_PATH, #oldPath#, #newPath#), FOLDER_LEVEL = FOLDER_LEVEL + #levelDistance#, USE_STATUS = 'Y', UPDATE_DATE = #timeUTC# WHERE FOLDER_PATH like concat(concat(#oldPath#, '_'), '%') AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE SET FOLDER_ID = #folderId#, USE_STATUS = 'Y', UPDATE_DATE = #timeUTC# WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
